prediction.pre_match_note: F1 2027 Season Opener Bahrain. New 2027 regulation cycle — limited testing data, higher uncertainty. Pole position from qualifying (0.241s delta). Tier 1 constructor. No grid penalties. Standard circuit. SMS 75 reflects reduced confidence from new regulation uncertainty.

calibration_flags.notes: F1 season opener with new regulations. Qualifying delta (0.241s) remained primary signal even under regulation uncertainty. New regulation cycle does NOT negate qualifying delta as signal — car advantage still shows in qualifying. Third qualifying_delta record confirms the modifier's robustness across regulation changes.
